label: Ritual outcome comp (loved one present)
description: Applies qualityOffset when a pawn with opinion >= 20 of the specified role pawn is participating.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown when the loved one is present.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset applied when a loved one is present.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.

labelNotMet.label: Label (not met)
labelNotMet.description: Label displayed when no loved one is present.

lovedOneOfRole.label: Loved one of role
lovedOneOfRole.description: Ritual role ID of the pawn whose loved ones are checked among participants.
